title: Una donna ha ucciso
writer: Siro Angeli, Giorgio Capitani, Vittorio Cottafavi
actors: Frank Latimore, Lianella Carell, Alessandro Serbaroli
plot: During World War II, a young Italian woman falls in love with a British soldier, who turns out to be a worthless bum. Things deteriorate to the point where tragedy strikes and the woman is put on trial for shooting her boyfriend t...
